nasb.text: When it was already quite late, His disciples came to Him and said, “This place is desolate and it is already quite late;

esv.text: And when it grew late, his disciples came to him and said, “This is a desolate place, and the hour is now late.

cnv.text: 天晚了，門徒前來對他說：“這裡是曠野的地方，天已經很晚了，

ccb.text: 天色晚了，门徒过来对耶稣说：“时候已经不早了，这里又是荒郊野外，

csbs.text: 天已经晚了，他的门徒们来到耶稣面前，说：“这是个荒僻的地方，而且天已经晚了。
